req.title: Reconciliation report (boundary variant)
req.statement: The system shall produce a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank; non-zero variance shall open an incident. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-050 governs EOD reconciliation between internal ledger and correspondent bank. Four orthogonal test cases are needed: (1) EP-positive: ledger equals bank => report stored, no incident; (2) EP-negative / DT: ledger differs from bank by a mid-range amount => report stored AND incident opened with correct severity; (3) BVA-boundary-lower: variance is exactly the minimum threshold (1 cent / 0.01) => incident opened, confirming inclusive lower-bound behaviour; (4) BVA-boundary-upper: variance equals the maximum threshold => incident opened with highest severity, confirming inclusive upper-bound behaviour. Each test calls POST /cron/reconcile with a seeded ledger payload, then verifies both the stored report and any incident state via GET endpoints. All tests reset ledger state through <seed_ledger_fixture> so they remain idempotent.

tests.name: test_reconcile_zero_variance_no_incident
preconditions: Internal ledger balance equals correspondent bank balance (variance = 0.00)
No pre-existing open incidents for today's reconciliation date
actions: Seed ledger and bank mirror with identical balance via <seed_ledger_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with EOD trigger payload for today
GET /reports/reconciliation?date=<today> to retrieve stored report
GET /incidents?source=reconciliation&date=<today> to check incident list
expected: Incident list is empty (no incident opened)
trace: R-FIN-050: non-zero variance shall open an incident (contrapositive: zero variance => no incident)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date

BASE = "http://localhost:8080"
TODAY = date.today().isoformat()


def test_reconcile_zero_variance_no_incident(seed_ledger_fixture, api_auth_headers):
    seed_ledger_fixture(ledger_balance=10000.00, bank_balance=10000.00, date=TODAY)

    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE}/cron/reconcile",
        json={"trigger": "EOD", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=15,
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report_resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/reports/reconciliation",
        params={"date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    )
    assert report_resp.status_code == 200
    report = report_resp.json()
    assert float(report["variance"]) == 0.00
    assert report["status"] == "BALANCED"

    inc_resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    )
    assert inc_resp.status_code == 200
    assert inc_resp.json()["incidents"] == []

tests.name: test_reconcile_mid_range_variance_opens_incident
preconditions: Internal ledger balance differs from correspondent bank balance by 500.00 (mid-range variance)
No pre-existing open incidents for today's reconciliation date
actions: Seed ledger with balance 10500.00 and bank mirror with balance 10000.00 via <seed_ledger_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with EOD trigger payload for today
GET /reports/reconciliation?date=<today>
GET /incidents?source=reconciliation&date=<today>
expected: Incident severity matches the 500.00 variance band per error pathway rules
trace: R-FIN-050: non-zero variance shall open an incident
R-FIN-050: incident severity based on variance
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date

BASE = "http://localhost:8080"
TODAY = date.today().isoformat()


def test_reconcile_mid_range_variance_opens_incident(seed_ledger_fixture, api_auth_headers, expected_severity_for):
    seed_ledger_fixture(ledger_balance=10500.00, bank_balance=10000.00, date=TODAY)

    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE}/cron/reconcile",
        json={"trigger": "EOD", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=15,
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/reports/reconciliation",
        params={"date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    ).json()
    assert float(report["variance"]) == 500.00
    assert report["status"] == "VARIANCE_DETECTED"

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    ).json()["incidents"]
    assert len(incidents) == 1
    assert incidents[0]["severity"] == expected_severity_for(variance=500.00)

tests.name: test_reconcile_variance_at_minimum_threshold_opens_incident
preconditions: Internal ledger balance exceeds correspondent bank balance by exactly 0.01 (minimum non-zero threshold)
No pre-existing open incidents for today's reconciliation date
actions: Seed ledger with balance 10000.01 and bank mirror with balance 10000.00 via <seed_ledger_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with EOD trigger payload for today
GET /reports/reconciliation?date=<today>
GET /incidents?source=reconciliation&date=<today>
expected: Exactly one incident is opened (inclusive lower bound confirmed)
trace: R-FIN-050: boundary behaviour at exact min threshold
R-FIN-050: non-zero variance shall open an incident
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date

BASE = "http://localhost:8080"
TODAY = date.today().isoformat()
MIN_VARIANCE = 0.01


def test_reconcile_variance_at_minimum_threshold_opens_incident(seed_ledger_fixture, api_auth_headers):
    seed_ledger_fixture(
        ledger_balance=10000.00 + MIN_VARIANCE,
        bank_balance=10000.00,
        date=TODAY,
    )

    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE}/cron/reconcile",
        json={"trigger": "EOD", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=15,
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/reports/reconciliation",
        params={"date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    ).json()
    assert round(float(report["variance"]), 2) == MIN_VARIANCE
    assert report["status"] == "VARIANCE_DETECTED"

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    ).json()["incidents"]
    assert len(incidents) == 1

tests.name: test_reconcile_variance_at_maximum_threshold_opens_critical_incident
preconditions: Internal ledger balance exceeds correspondent bank balance by exactly the configured maximum variance threshold
No pre-existing open incidents for today's reconciliation date
actions: Read MAX_VARIANCE from <env_config>
Seed ledger with balance (base + MAX_VARIANCE) and bank mirror with base via <seed_ledger_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with EOD trigger payload for today
GET /reports/reconciliation?date=<today>
GET /incidents?source=reconciliation&date=<today>
expected: Exactly one incident opened with severity == 'CRITICAL' (inclusive upper bound confirmed)
trace: R-FIN-050: boundary behaviour at exact max threshold
R-FIN-050: incident severity based on variance (maximum band => CRITICAL)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date

BASE = "http://localhost:8080"
TODAY = date.today().isoformat()
BASE_BALANCE = 50000.00


def test_reconcile_variance_at_maximum_threshold_opens_critical_incident(
    seed_ledger_fixture, api_auth_headers, env_config
):
    max_variance = float(env_config["RECONCILE_MAX_VARIANCE"])
    seed_ledger_fixture(
        ledger_balance=BASE_BALANCE + max_variance,
        bank_balance=BASE_BALANCE,
        date=TODAY,
    )

    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE}/cron/reconcile",
        json={"trigger": "EOD", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=15,
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/reports/reconciliation",
        params={"date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    ).json()
    assert round(float(report["variance"]), 2) == round(max_variance, 2)
    assert report["status"] == "VARIANCE_DETECTED"

    incidents = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    ).json()["incidents"]
    assert len(incidents) == 1
    assert incidents[0]["severity"] == "CRITICAL"

tests.name: test_reconcile_missing_eod_trigger_returns_error
actions: POST /cron/reconcile with payload omitting the required 'trigger' field
Verify no report is persisted for today
Verify no incident is opened
expected: Response body contains a validation error referencing 'trigger'
No reconciliation report stored for today
trace: R-FIN-050: EOD trigger is required precondition
R-FIN-050: report stored only on valid trigger execution
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date

BASE = "http://localhost:8080"
TODAY = date.today().isoformat()


def test_reconcile_missing_eod_trigger_returns_error(api_auth_headers):
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE}/cron/reconcile",
        json={"date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    )
    assert resp.status_code in (400, 422)
    body = resp.json()
    assert "trigger" in str(body).lower()

    report_resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/reports/reconciliation",
        params={"date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    )
    assert report_resp.status_code in (404, 200)
    if report_resp.status_code == 200:
        assert report_resp.json().get("report") is None

    inc_resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE}/incidents",
        params={"source": "reconciliation", "date": TODAY},
        headers=api_auth_headers,
        timeout=10,
    )
    assert inc_resp.json()["incidents"] == []
